items.title: Partner Relationship Management Market to Witness 13.90% CAGR by 2031 | SkyQuest Technology
items.author: Globe Newswire
items.description: The global partner relationship management market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 13.90% from 2024 to 2031, reaching a value of USD 3.32 Billion. The market is driven by the increasing necessity of partner networks collaboration and collaboration across channels.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article states that Oracle Corporation is a key player contributing to the growth of the partner relationship management market in North America, indicating a positive outlook for the company.
The article states that Salesforce.com, Inc. is a key player contributing to the growth of the partner relationship management market in North America, indicating a positive outlook for the company.
